payload.label: clock
payload.long_description: Decorative wall clock with an off-white round dial and raised dark hour markers set into a glossy dark scalloped/sunburst frame; photographed at an oblique side angle so the right edge is visible while the left side is partially cut off by the crop; frame appears reflective (metal or glossy plastic) and the piece is wall-mounted — estimated distance from camera ~2.0 m.
